prompt: Create a vibrant vertical 2:3 cinematic fantasy adventure illustration in a polished 3D animated feature style. Show a young pirate girl standing full-body on the sunlit wooden deck of a pirate ship, confident pose with one hand on her hip and the other arm extended outward. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered solid medium-brown square mask with no facial features. She has abundant dark brown curly hair blowing in the sea breeze, tied with a bright pink bandana bow, and wears a cream lace-up pirate blouse with puffy sleeves, a short purple vest with gold trim, loose high-waisted purple trousers decorated with small gold stars, a wide brown belt with a large brass buckle and dangling chain, a pink patterned sash at one hip, brown cuffed pirate boots with gold star accents, and small gold jewelry. Perched on her shoulder is a cute tiny blue fantasy monkey-mouse mascot with huge round ears, big expressive eyes, a cheerful smile, colorful pink and blue feathers on its head, a curled tail, and a small gold star charm wand. The setting is a richly detailed pirate ship deck with ropes, barrels, chests, brass fittings, mast, rigging, and glowing golden sparkles around the character’s feet; behind her are striped cream-and-red sails and exactly 1 black pirate flag with a yellow skull-and-crossbones style emblem. In the background, show a turquoise ocean with foamy waves, a tropical island with cliffs and palm trees, fluffy white clouds, and exactly 4 white seagulls flying in the bright blue sky. Use warm golden-hour sunlight, saturated colors, rim lighting, shallow depth of field, dynamic composition, ultra-detailed textures, whimsical magical atmosphere, and high-end family adventure movie concept art quality. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.
